title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 446.350 - Copies of plats, surveys
text:
446.350.  Copies of plats, surveys — United States surveyor's office. — Copies of plats, surveys, entries, New Madrid certificates and locations, and of all other papers which are by law required to be deposited or kept in the office of the surveyor of the lands of the United States in this state, duly certified by such surveyor, shall be received as evidence.
(RSMo 1939 § 1838) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1674; 1919 § 5361; 1909 § 6306 
Copies of entries on book of United States land office to be received in evidence, 490.200 
Copies of letters received by the register of any United States land office from superior officer received in evidence, 490.210
